nodes.name: Impairment Loss
nodes.description: Charge recorded when fair value of non-marketable equity securities falls below cost basis.

nodes.name: Qualitative Factors
nodes.description: Company-specific and external considerations such as financial condition, business outlook, industry performance, and regulatory, economic or technological environment.

nodes.name: Indicators Of Impairment
nodes.description: Qualitative or quantitative signals that fair value of equity securities may have declined below cost.
